# Changelog | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Version 2.0.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#version-200 "Direct link to Version 2.0.0")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

warning

This version of the API is not backward compatible with the previous version. Please refer to the [API documentation](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/)
 for more information.

### API endpoint[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#api-endpoint "Direct link to API endpoint")

*   The base URL for the **V2** APIs is `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2`

### Global change in parameter naming[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#global-change-in-parameter-naming "Direct link to Global change in parameter naming")

*   All use of `whisper-hash` as a parameter has been replaced with `whisper_hash` for consistency.

### Whisper parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#whisper-parameters "Direct link to Whisper parameters")

#### Added[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#added "Direct link to Added")

*   `mode` (str, optional): The processing mode.
*   `mark_vertical_lines` (bool, optional): Whether to reproduce vertical lines in the document.
*   `mark_horizontal_lines` (bool, optional): Whether to reproduce horizontal lines in the document.
*   `line_splitter_strategy` (str, optional): The line splitter strategy to use. An advanced option for customizing the line splitting process.
*   `lang` (str, optional): The language of the document.
*   `tag` (str, optional): A tag to associate with the document. Used for auditing and tracking purposes.
*   `file_name` (str, optional): The name of the file being processed. Used for auditing and tracking purposes.
*   `use_webhook` (str, optional): The name of the webhook to call after the document is processed.
*   `webhook_metadata` (str, optional): Metadata to send to the webhook after the document is processed.

#### Removed[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#removed "Direct link to Removed")

*   `timeout` (int, optional): The timeout for API requests. _There is no sync mode now. All requests are async._
*   `force_text_processing` (bool, optional): Whether to force text processing. _This is feature is removed_
*   `ocr_provider` (str, optional): The OCR provider to use. _This is superseded by `mode`_
*   `processing_mode` (str, optional): The processing mode. _This is superseded by `mode`_
*   `store_metadata_for_highlighting` (bool, optional): Whether to store metadata for highlighting. _Feature is removed. Data still available and set back when retrieve is called_

### New features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#new-features "Direct link to New features")

#### Webhooks[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#webhooks "Direct link to Webhooks")

*   Added support for webhooks. You can now register a webhook and use it to receive the processed document.

*   [Version 2.0.0](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#version-200)
    *   [API endpoint](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#api-endpoint)
        
    *   [Global change in parameter naming](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#global-change-in-parameter-naming)
        
    *   [Whisper parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#whisper-parameters)
        
    *   [New features](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_changelog/#new-features)

---

# Introduction | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

LLMWhisperer APIs are a set of APIs that allow you to:

*   Convert your complex PDF documents, scanned documents, scanned images, Office documents and spreadsheets to text format which can be used with LLMs
*   Location information about every line of text extracted from the document which can be used to highlight search terms or extraction results in your frontend application

The APIs are RESTful and can be easily integrated into your existing systems. There are Python and Node.js clients available to help you get started quickly. Refer to documentation for more information.

### API Endpoints[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#api-endpoints "Direct link to API Endpoints")

| Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [`/whisper`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/) | Convert your PDF documents, scanned documents, scanned images, Office documents and spreadsheets to text format which can be used by LLMs or other downstream applications. |
| [`/whisper-status`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/) | Get the status of the conversion process. This can be used to check the status of the conversion process when the conversion is done. |
| [`/whisper-retrieve`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/) | Retrieve the converted text of the document. |
| [`/whisper-details`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/) | Check the details of the text extraction process and all metadata |
| [`/get-usage-info`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/) | Get usage metrics for your account. |
| [`/usage`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/) | Check the usage metrics of your LLMWhisperer account based on the tag provided. eg creditcard, resume |
| [`/whisper-manage-callback`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/) | Register webhooks (callbacks) which can be called after a conversion finishes |
| [`/highlights`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/) | Retrieve the line metadata which helps with highlighting |

### Base URL[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#base-url "Direct link to Base URL")

### US Region:[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#us-region "Direct link to US Region:")

    https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2

### EU Region:[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#eu-region "Direct link to EU Region:")

    https://llmwhisperer-api.eu-west.unstract.com/api/v2

### Authentication[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#authentication "Direct link to Authentication")

All the APIs require an API key to be passed in the header. You can get your API key by signing up for LLMWhisperer. The API key is passed in the header as `unstract-key`.

Curl example:

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/get-usage-info' \-H 'unstract-key: <PASTE YOUR API KEY>'

### Metering[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#metering "Direct link to Metering")

The APIs are metered based on the number of pages processed per mode (`native_text`, `low_cost`, `high_quality` and `form`). You can get the usage metrics by calling the [`/get-usage-info`](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/)
 API endpoint.

### Typical Workflows[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#typical-workflows "Direct link to Typical Workflows")

#### Polling Workflow[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#polling-workflow "Direct link to Polling Workflow")

1.  Call the `/whisper` API to convert your document to text format.
2.  Check the status of the conversion process by calling the `/whisper-status` API. Repeat this step until the status is `processed`.
3.  Once the conversion is done, retrieve the converted text by calling the `/whisper-retrieve` API.

#### Callback Workflow[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#callback-workflow "Direct link to Callback Workflow")

Register a webhook (callback) by calling the `/whisper-manage-callback` API. This needs to be done only once. After that, the webhook can be used by just passing the name of the webhook in the `/whisper` API call. The webhook will be called after the conversion is done.

1.  Call the `/whisper` API to convert your document to text format. Pass the name of the webhook in the request.
2.  The webhook will be called after the conversion is done. The webhook will receive the converted text.

*   [API Endpoints](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#api-endpoints)
    
*   [Base URL](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#base-url)
    
*   [US Region:](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#us-region)
    
*   [EU Region:](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#eu-region)
    
*   [Authentication](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#authentication)
    
*   [Metering](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#metering)
    
*   [Typical Workflows](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/#typical-workflows)

---

# Highlight API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Retrieve the line metadata which helps with highlighting

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `/highlights` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/highlights` |
| Method | `GET` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>` |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| whisper\_hash | string |     | Yes | The whisper hash returned while starting the whisper process. |
| lines | string |     | Yes | Define which lines metadata to retrieve. You can specify which lines metadata to retrieve with this parameter. Example `1-5,7,21-` will retrieve lines metadata 1,2,3,4,5,7,21,22,23,24... till the last line meta data. |

Example Curl Request[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#example-curl-request "Direct link to Example Curl Request")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/highlights?whisper_hash=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX&lines=1-2' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

info

To include the headers in the response use `curl -i` in the request.

Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#response "Direct link to Response")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | Line metadata |
| 400 | `application/json` |     | Error while retrieveing. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example `200` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#example-200-response "Direct link to example-200-response")

    {  "1": {    "base_y": 0,    "base_y_percent": 0,    "height": 0,    "height_percent": 0,    "page": 0,    "page_height": 0,    "raw": [      0,      0,      0,      0    ]  },  "2": {    "base_y": 155,    "base_y_percent": 4.8927,    "height": 51,    "height_percent": 1.6098,    "page": 0,    "page_height": 3168,    "raw": [      0,      155,      51,      3168    ]  }}

### Example `400` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#example-400-response "Direct link to example-400-response")

    {    "message": "Line metadata not found"}

### Line Metadata[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#line-metadata "Direct link to Line Metadata")

This data can be used show the bounding box of each line of text extracted from the document in the original document. Useful for highlighting the extracted text in the original document.

The line metadata contains the bounding box coordinates for each line of text extracted from the document. For each line, an array of arrays is provided with the bounding box coordinates. The bounding box information is represented as a array of four integers: \[page\_no, y, height, max\_height\], where:

*   `page_no`: The page number of the document.
*   `base_y`: The y-coordinate of the bounding box (bottom).
*   `height`: The height of the bounding box.
*   `page_height`: The height of the original page.

info

Highlighting is for the entire row of the original document. The x coordinates are not provided as they will effectively be the width of the page. `x1=0` and `x2=page_width` always.

      (0,y-height) +-------------------------+ (page_width,y-height)               |                         |               |                         |         (0,y) +-------------------------+ (page_width,y)

    line_metadata = {  "1": { # Line 1    "base_y": 0,    "base_y_percent": 0,    "height": 0, # Height    "height_percent": 0,    "page": 0,    "page_height": 0,    "raw": [  #(All 0s represent a blank line)      0, # Page number      0,      0,      0    ]  },  "2": { # Line 2    "base_y": 155, # Y-coordinate    "base_y_percent": 4.8927,    "height": 51, # Height    "height_percent": 1.6098,    "page": 0, # Page number    "page_height": 3168, # Page height    "raw": [      0, # Page number      155, # Y-coordinate      51, # Height      3168 # Page height    ]  }}

*   [Parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#parameters)
    
*   [Example Curl Request](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#example-curl-request)
    
*   [Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#response)
    *   [Example `200` Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#example-200-response)
        
    *   [Example `400` Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#example-400-response)
        
    *   [Line Metadata](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting_api/#line-metadata)

---

# Retrieve API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Retrieve the extracted text executed through the whisper API. This can be used to retrieve the text of the conversion process when the conversion is done in async mode.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `/whisper-retrieve` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-retrieve` |
| Method | `GET` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>` |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| whisper\_hash | string |     | Yes | The whisper hash returned while starting the whisper process. |
| text\_only | bool | false | No  | If set to true, only the text is returned. If set to false, the text along with the metadata is returned. |

Example Curl Request[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#example-curl-request "Direct link to Example Curl Request")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-retrieve?whisper_hash=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

info

To include the headers in the response use `curl -i` in the request.

Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#response "Direct link to Response")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | Extracted text and metadata |
| 400 | `application/json` |     | Error while retrieveing. Refer below for JSON format |
| 404 | `application/json` |     | If invalid whisper\_hash is provided |

### Example `400` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#example-400-response "Direct link to example-400-response")

    {    "message": "<Error Message>"}

### Example `404` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#example-404-response "Direct link to example-404-response")

    {    "message": "Whisper job unknown"}

### Possible Error Messages[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#possible-error-messages "Direct link to Possible Error Messages")

*   Whisper not ready : **status**
*   Whisper already delivered

> Note: The extracted text can be retrieved only once. Make sure to store the text in your system if you need to access it multiple times. This is for security and privacy reasons. This behaviour can be controlled in on-prem installations.

Response data (`text_only=false`)[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#response-data-text_onlyfalse "Direct link to response-data-text_onlyfalse")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "confidence_metadata" : [],        "metadata" : {},    "result_text" : "<Extracted Text>",    "webhook_metadata" : ""}

### Confidence Metadata[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#confidence-metadata "Direct link to Confidence Metadata")

The confidence metadata contains the confidence score for each line of text extracted from the document. For each line, an array of JSONs is provided with words and their confidence scores. Words with confidence of >= 0.9 are ignored. The confidence score is a value between 0 and 1, where 1 indicates high confidence and 0 indicates low confidence.

      # Each element represents confidence scores for a line  confidence_metadata = [    [],                             # Line 1     [],                             # Line 2    [],                             # Line 3    [],                             # Line 4    [],                             # Line 5    [],                             # Line 6    [                               # Line 7      {        "confidence": "0.801",        "text": "Please"      },      {        "confidence": "0.852",        "text": "find"      }    ],    [                               # Line 8      {        "confidence": "0.767",        "text": "payment"      }    ],    [],                             # Line 9\
\
In the above example, the confidence score for the words "Please" and "find" in line 7 is 0.801 and 0.852 respectively. The confidence score for the word "payment" in line 8 is 0.767.\
\
### Metadata[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#metadata "Direct link to Metadata")\
\
Metadata about the document. Currently, the metadata is empty. This field is reserved for future use.\
\
### Result Text[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#result-text "Direct link to Result Text")\
\
The extracted text from the document.\
\
### Webhook Metadata[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#webhook-metadata "Direct link to Webhook Metadata")\
\
Metadata sent to the webhook after the document is processed.\
\
Response data (`text_only=true`)[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#response-data-text_onlytrue "Direct link to response-data-text_onlytrue")\
\
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\
\
Return only the extracted text from the document.\
\
*   [Parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#parameters)\
    \
*   [Example Curl Request](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#example-curl-request)\
    \

        \

    *   [Confidence Metadata](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_retrieve_api/#confidence-metadata)\

# Highlighting support | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

When users perform manual review of extractions, source document highlighting can be a powerful.

_This is a video of [Unstract's Human Quality Review](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/)
 feature that uses LLMWhisperer's Highlighting abilities._

In this article, we explain how you can achieve source document highlighting easily using LLMWhisperer in combination with an LLM.

How Highlighting works[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting/#how-highlighting-works "Direct link to How Highlighting works")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

There are two components to making highlighting work: the first is making the data available and the second, the user interface bit where the actual highlighting happens.

### Making the data available[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting/#making-the-data-available "Direct link to Making the data available")

*   Make LLMWhisperer return line numbers for each of the lines extracted. Hexadecimal line numbers are used to keep the extraction LLM from confusing it with other numbers in the document.
*   LLMWhisperer maintains the coordinates of each line in the document. No actual data from the document is stored. Just the line numbers and their respective coordinates from the document.
*   When extracting fields, prompt the LLM to include the line numbers from which the field was extracted.
*   Call the [Highlighting coordinates helper function](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/python_client/llm_whisperer_python_client_intro/#highlighting-data-helper-function)
     in the client SDK to get coordinates to highlight in the UI. This takes into account the current size of the document displayed.

### Highlighting in the UI[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting/#highlighting-in-the-ui "Direct link to Highlighting in the UI")

Assuming you're using a web-based front-end, we can help you with the code to get the highlighting done if you are a paying customer. Please [reach out to us](https://unstract.com/schedule-a-demo/)
 and we'll help you with this.

*   [How Highlighting works](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting/#how-highlighting-works)
    *   [Making the data available](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting/#making-the-data-available)
        
    *   [Highlighting in the UI](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_highlighting/#highlighting-in-the-ui)

---

# Status API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Check the status of the text extraction process. This can be used to check the status of the conversion process when the conversion is done in async mode.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `/whisper-status` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-status` |
| Method | `GET` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>` |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| whisper\_hash | string |     | Yes | The whisper hash returned while starting the whisper process. |

Example Curl Request[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#example-curl-request "Direct link to Example Curl Request")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-status?whisper_hash=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

info

To include the headers in the response use `curl -i` in the request.

Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#response "Direct link to Response")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the status. Refer below for JSON format |
| 400 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the error message. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example `200` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#example-200-response "Direct link to example-200-response")

    {    "detail": [        {            "execution_time_in_seconds": 4,            "message": "extraction_success",            "page_no": 1        },        {            "execution_time_in_seconds": 4,            "message": "extraction_success",            "page_no": 2        }    ],    "message": "<human readble message>",    "status": "processed"}

### Example `400` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#example-400-response "Direct link to example-400-response")

    {    "message": "Whisper job not found for the provided whisper hash"}

### Possible Statuses[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#possible-statuses "Direct link to Possible Statuses")

#### 200 OK[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#200-ok "Direct link to 200 OK")

*   `accepted`: The document has been accepted and has been added to the processing queue.
*   `processing`: The document is still being processed. Check back later.
*   `processed`: The document has been processed and the text is ready to be retrieved.
*   `error`: The document processing has failed. Check the error message for more details.
*   `retrieved`: The text has been retrieved.

*   [Parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#parameters)
    
*   [Example Curl Request](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#example-curl-request)
    
*   [Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#response)
    *   [Example `200` Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#example-200-response)
        
    *   [Example `400` Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#example-400-response)
        
    *   [Possible Statuses](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_status_api/#possible-statuses)

---

# Extraction API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Convert your PDF/Scanned documents to text format which can be used by LLMs

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `/whisper` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper` |
| Method | `POST` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>` |
| Body | Binary data (file contents) |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| mode | string | `form` | No  | The processing mode to be used. Refer to the [modes](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#modes)<br> section for more information. |
| output\_mode | string | `layout_preserving` | No  | `layout_preserving` or `text` [output mode](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#output-modes) |
| page\_seperator | string | `<<<` | No  | The string to be used as a page separator. |
| pages\_to\_extract | string |     | No  | Define which pages to extract. By default all pages are extracted. You can specify which pages to extract with this parameter. Example `1-5,7,21-` will extract pages 1,2,3,4,5,7,21,22,23,24... till the last page. |
| median\_filter\_size | integer | `0` | No  | The size of the median filter to be applied to the image. This is used to remove noise from the image. _This parameter works only in the `low_cost` mode_ |
| gaussian\_blur\_radius | integer | `0` | No  | The radius of the gaussian blur to be applied to the image. This is used to remove noise from the image. _This parameter works only in the `low_cost` mode_ |
| line\_splitter\_tolerance | float | `0.4` | No  | Factor to decide when to move text to the next line when it is above or below the baseline. The default value of `0.4` signifies 40% of the average character height |
| line\_splitter\_strategy | string | `left-priority` | No  | The line splitter strategy to use. An advanced option for customizing the line splitting process. Refer to the documentation below |
| horizontal\_stretch\_factor | float | `1.0` | No  | Factor by which a horizontal stretch has to applied. It defaults to `1.0`. A stretch factor of `1.1` would mean at 10% stretch factor applied. Normally this factor need not be adjusted. You might want to use this parameter when multi column layouts back into each other. For example in a two column layout, the two columns get merged into one. |
| url\_in\_post | boolean | `false` | No  | If set to `true` send the URL to download from - in the post body. See example below |
| url _(deprecated, use url\_in\_post instead)_ | string |     | No  | The default behaviour of the API is to process the document sent in the request body. If you want to process a document from a URL, you can provide the URL here. The URL should be accessible without any authentication. If the request body is empty, the API will try to process the document from the URL. |
| mark\_vertical\_lines | boolean | `false` | No  | Whether to reproduce vertical lines in the document. Note: This parameter is not applicable if mode=native\_text. |
| mark\_horizontal\_lines | boolean | `false` | No  | Whether to reproduce horizontal lines in the document. Note: This parameter is not applicable if mode=native\_text and will not work if mark\_vertical\_lines is set to false. |
| lang | string | `eng` | No  | The language hint to OCR. Currently auto detected. _This parameter is ingnored in the version._ |
| tag | string | `default` | No  | Auditing feature. Set a value which will be associated with the invocation of the API. This can be used for cross referencing in usage reports |
| file\_name | string |     | No  | Auditing feature. Set a value which will be associated with the invocation of the API. This can be used for cross referencing in usage reports |
| use\_webhook | string |     | No  | The webhook's name which will should be called after the conversion is complete. The name should have been registered earlier using the webhooks management endpoint |
| webhook\_metadata | string |     | No  | Any metadata which should be sent to the webhook. This data is sent verbatim to the callback endpoint. Refer to webhooks documentation. |
| add\_line\_nos | boolean | `false` | No  | Adds line numbers to the extracted text and saves line metadata, which can be queried later using the highlights API. |
| allow\_rotated\_text | boolean | `true` | No  | If set to `true`, all text including rotated/angled text (such as watermarks) is preserved in the output. Set to `false` to filter out rotated text like watermarks from the OCR output. _This parameter works only with `form`, `high_quality` and `table` modes._ |

### Modes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#modes "Direct link to Modes")

Refer to detailed comparison of modes [here](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/llm_whisperer_modes/)
.

Below are the supported modes in LLMWhisperer, each controlled via the `mode` query parameter in the API. Use the appropriate mode based on document type and desired extraction quality.

*   **`native_text`** — For documents with digitally embedded text (not scanned).  
    Use this mode when dealing with documents like software-generated PDFs, Word files, or native text-based receipts.
    
    > Very fast and cost-effective for clean, machine-readable content.
    
*   **`low_cost`** — For decent-quality scanned images/PDFs without handwriting.  
    Recommended when you need good accuracy with lower inference cost.
    
    > Suitable for OCR on clean, printed documents.
    
*   **`high_quality`** — For challenging inputs like handwritten or low-quality scans.  
    Provides maximum accuracy using advanced OCR and AI enhancements.
    
    > Ideal for noisy, complex, or handwritten documents.
    
*   **`form`** — For documents that include forms, checkboxes, radio buttons, or structured form-like layouts.  
    Detects and extracts data from forms with structural context.
    
    > Supports field mapping and visual grouping.
    
*   **`table`** — For documents with dense table structures like financial reports, statements, spreadsheets.  
    Extracts tabular data with layout and cell grouping preserved.
    
    > Optimized for extracting structured rows/columns from tables.
    

### Output Modes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#output-modes "Direct link to Output Modes")

**Layout preserving (`layout_preserving`)** mode tries to extract the text from the document as is, maintaining the structural layout of the document. This works very well for LLM consumption. This mode uses many techniques to provide the text in the best possible way for LLMs. It also removes white spaces and other unwanted characters from the text to make the result more cost-effective for LLMs.

**Text (`text`)** mode extracts the text from the document without applying any processing or intelligence. This mode is useful when the `layout_preserving` mode is not able to extract the text properly. This can happen if the document contains too many different fonts and font sizes.

Request Body[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#request-body "Direct link to Request Body")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The request body should contain the PDF/Scanned document that needs to be converted to text. The document should be in `application/octet-stream` format.

If you are using the `url_in_post` parameter, the URL should be sent in the request body. Content-Type should be `text/plain`. See curl example below.

Example Curl Requests[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#example-curl-requests "Direct link to Example Curl Requests")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Upload document[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#upload-document "Direct link to Upload document")

    curl -X POST --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper?mode=form&output_mode=layout_preserving' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>' \--data-binary '@your-file-to-process.pdf'

### Process document from URL[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#process-document-from-url "Direct link to Process document from URL")

    curl -X POST --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper?mode=form&output_mode=layout_preserving&url_in_post=true' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>' \--data 'https://your-url-to-process.pdf'

> To include the headers in the response use `curl -i` in the request.

Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#response "Direct link to Response")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A successful request will return a `202` status code with a JSON response containing the `whisper_hash` which can be used to check the status of the conversion process.

The typical workflow is to call the `/whisper` API to convert your document to text format. Check the status of the conversion process by calling the `/whisper-status` API. Repeat this step until the status is `processed`. Once the conversion is done, retrieve the converted text by calling the `/whisper-retrieve` API. Another wokrflow is to use the webhooks to get the converted text. Refer to the documentation for more information.

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 202 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with `whisper_hash` which can be used with the status API to get status and later retrieve the extracted text. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example `202` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#example-202-response "Direct link to example-202-response")

    {  "message": "Whisper Job Accepted",  "status": "processing",  "whisper_hash": "xxxxxa96|xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx4ed3da759ef670f"}

*   [Parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#parameters)
    *   [Modes](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#modes)
        
    *   [Output Modes](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#output-modes)
        
*   [Request Body](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#request-body)
    
*   [Example Curl Requests](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#example-curl-requests)
    *   [Upload document](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#upload-document)
        
    *   [Process document from URL](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#process-document-from-url)
        
*   [Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#response)
    *   [Example `202` Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_api/#example-202-response)

---

# Detail API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Check the details of the text extraction process.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `/whisper-detail` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-detail` |
| Method | `GET` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>` |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| whisper\_hash | string |     | Yes | The whisper hash returned while starting the whisper process. |

Example Curl Request[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/#example-curl-request "Direct link to Example Curl Request")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-detail?whisper_hash=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

info

To include the headers in the response use `curl -i` in the request.

Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/#response "Direct link to Response")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the details. Refer below for JSON format |
| 400 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the error message. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example `200` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/#example-200-response "Direct link to example-200-response")

    {    "completed_at": "Mon, 10 Feb 2025 10:40:58 GMT",    "mode": "form",    "processed_pages": 1, # Proccesed numbe of pages    "processing_started_at": "Mon, 10 Feb 2025 10:40:53 GMT",    "processing_time_in_seconds": 120.88,    "requested_pages": 1, # Requested no of pages to be processed.    "tag": "<tag supplied in whisper request>",    "total_pages": 4, #No of pages in the document uploaded    "upload_file_size_in_kb": 618.488,    "whisper_hash": "<whisper_hash>"}

### Example `400` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/#example-400-response "Direct link to example-400-response")

    {    "message": "Record not found"}

*   [Parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_text_extraction_detail_api/#parameters)

# LLMWhisperer Cloud Edition | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

[LLMWhisperer Cloud](https://unstract.com/llmwhisperer/)
 is a fully managed SaaS offering that makes complex document data ready for LLM consumption. No infrastructure to manage — sign up, get an API key, and start extracting text from your documents.

Key Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#key-features "Direct link to Key Features")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Layout-preserving text extraction** for maximum accuracy from LLMs
*   **Checkbox and radio button detection** in common forms, presented in an LLM-friendly way
*   **Auto-compaction** to reduce LLM token consumption while preserving layout
*   **Image preprocessing** (Gaussian Blur, Median Filtering, Contrast Adjustments) to improve text clarity in scanned documents
*   **300+ language support** with handwriting recognition
*   **Auto mode switching** from native text to OCR as needed
*   **Auto PDF repair** for corrupted or malformed documents
*   Support for PDFs, images, MS Office, LibreOffice, and [more](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/list_of_file_types_supported/)
    

Processing Modes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#processing-modes "Direct link to Processing Modes")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LLMWhisperer Cloud supports multiple processing modes, each optimized for different document types and use cases:

| Mode | Best For |
| --- | --- |
| `native_text` | Digital PDFs with embedded text |
| `low_cost` | Cost-effective OCR for scanned documents |
| `high_quality` | AI/ML-enhanced OCR with handwriting support |
| `form` | Documents with checkboxes, radio buttons, and form fields |
| `table` | Documents with complex tabular structures |

See [LLMWhisperer Modes](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/llm_whisperer_modes/)
 for the full feature matrix and recommended use cases.

API Regions[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#api-regions "Direct link to API Regions")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LLMWhisperer Cloud is available in the following regions:

| Region | Base URL |
| --- | --- |
| US Central | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2` |
| EU West | `https://llmwhisperer-api.eu-west.unstract.com/api/v2` |

Pricing[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#pricing "Direct link to Pricing")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Pay-as-you-go** — no flat fee or upfront commitment
*   **100 free pages daily** at no cost
*   Tiered pricing from **$1 to $15 per 1,000 pages** depending on mode
*   Metered based on the number of pages processed per mode

Visit the [Pricing page](https://unstract.com/pricing/)
 for detailed pricing information.

Getting Started[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#getting-started "Direct link to Getting Started")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  [Register](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/getting_started/llm_whisperer_registering/)
     for an LLMWhisperer account
2.  Try the [Playground](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/getting_started/llm_whisperer_playground/)
     to test document extraction
3.  Integrate using the [API Reference](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_apis_intro/)
    , [Python Client](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/python_client/llm_whisperer_python_client_intro/)
    , or [JavaScript Client](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/javascript_client/llm_whisperer_javascript_client_intro/)
    

*   [Key Features](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#key-features)
    
*   [Processing Modes](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#processing-modes)
    
*   [API Regions](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#api-regions)
    
*   [Pricing](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#pricing)
    
*   [Getting Started](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/#getting-started)

# Webhook Management API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `whisper-manage-callback` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-manage-callback` |
| Method | `GET`  <br>`POST`  <br>`PUT`  <br>`DELETE` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>`  <br>`Content-Type: application/json` |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Only `GET` and `DELETE` methods require parameters.

| Parameter | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| webhook\_name | string |     | Yes | The name of the webhook. |

Request Body for `POST` and `PUT` methods[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#request-body-for-post-and-put-methods "Direct link to request-body-for-post-and-put-methods")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "url": "<URL to be called after conversion is done>",    "auth_token": "<Token (bearer)>",    "webhook_name": "<Name of the webhook>"}

**If no authentication is enabled at the webhook endpoint leave the auth\_token as empty string**

When a webhook is registered with this API, it will send a dummy payload to the URL to check if the URL is functioning. If the URL is not functioning, the webhook will not be registered. The URL should return a `200` status code. The payload sent will be:

    {  "payload_status": {    "status": "test",    "message": "Testing webhook"  },  "line_metadata": [],  "confidence_metadata": [],  "result_text": "WEBHOOK_TEST",  "metadata": {}}

Example Curl Requests[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#example-curl-requests "Direct link to Example Curl Requests")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Register a webhook[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#register-a-webhook "Direct link to Register a webhook")

    curl -X POST --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-manage-callback' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>' \-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \-d '{"url":"https://<url-of-webhook>","auth_token":"<Token (bearer)>","webhook_name":"<Name of the webhook>"}'

### Get webhook details[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#get-webhook-details "Direct link to Get webhook details")

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-manage-callback?webhook_name=<Your webhook name>' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

### Update a webhook[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#update-a-webhook "Direct link to Update a webhook")

    curl -X PUT --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-manage-callback' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>' \-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \-d '{"url":"https://<new-url-of-webhook>","auth_token":"<New Token (bearer)>","webhook_name":"<Name of the existing webhook>"}'

### Delete a webhook[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#delete-a-webhook "Direct link to Delete a webhook")

    curl -X DELETE --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/whisper-manage-callback?webhook_name=<Your webhook name>' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

Response for `POST` method[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#response-for-post-method "Direct link to response-for-post-method")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 201 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the message. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example 201 Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#example-201-response "Direct link to Example 201 Response")

    {    "message": "Webhook created successfully"}

### Example 400 Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#example-400-response "Direct link to Example 400 Response")

    {    "message": "Error calling webhook: Webhook check failed: {\"error\":\"Unauthorized\"}\n"}

Response for `GET` method[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#response-for-get-method "Direct link to response-for-get-method")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the webhook details. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example 200 Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#example-200-response "Direct link to Example 200 Response")

    {        "url": "<URL to be called after conversion is done>",    "auth_token": "<Token (bearer)>",    "webhook_name": "<Name of the webhook>"}

Response for `PUT` method[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#response-for-put-method "Direct link to response-for-put-method")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the message. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example 200 Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#example-200-response-1 "Direct link to Example 200 Response")

    {    "message": "Webhook updated successfully"}

Response for `DELETE` method[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#response-for-delete-method "Direct link to response-for-delete-method")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the message. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example 200 Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_webhooks_manage/#example-200-response-2 "Direct link to Example 200 Response")

    {    "message": "Webhook deleted successfully"}

# Usage Stats API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Check the usage metrics of your LLMWhisperer account based on the tag provided.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `/usage` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/usage` |
| Method | `GET` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>` |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Parameter | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tag | string |     | Yes | The tag with user need to filter the usage data. |
| from\_date | string |     | No  | Format required is `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| to\_date | string |     | No  | Format required is `YYYY-MM-DD` |

Note: If neither `from_date` nor `to_date` is provided, usage will be calculated for the last 30 days by default.

Example Curl Request[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#example-curl-request "Direct link to Example Curl Request")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/usage?tag=<tag-name>' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

info

To include the headers in the response use `curl -i` in the request.

Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#response "Direct link to Response")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the status. Refer below for JSON format |
| 400 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the error message. Refer below for JSON format |

### Example `200` Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#example-200-response "Direct link to example-200-response")

    {    "end_date": <end date>,    "start_date": <start date>,    "subscription_id": <susbscription-id>,    "tag": "credit",    "usage": [               {            "pages_processed": <count>,            "service_type": "form"        },        {            "pages_processed": <count>,            "service_type": <mode>        }    ]    }

#### 400 Bad Request[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#400-bad-request "Direct link to 400 Bad Request")

    {    "message": "please specify the tag while requesting usage info"}

    {    "message": "Invalid date format. Valid date format YYYY-MM-DD"}

*   [Parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#parameters)
    
*   [Example Curl Request](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#example-curl-request)
    
*   [Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#response)
    *   [Example `200` Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_stats/#example-200-response)

---

# Usage Metrics API | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

Check the usage metrics of your LLMWhisperer account.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Endpoint | `/get-usage-info` |
| URL | `https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/get-usage-info` |
| Method | `GET` |
| Headers | `unstract-key: <YOUR API KEY>` |

Parameters[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#parameters "Direct link to Parameters")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

None

Example Curl Request[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#example-curl-request "Direct link to Example Curl Request")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl -X GET --location 'https://llmwhisperer-api.us-central.unstract.com/api/v2/get-usage-info' \-H 'unstract-key: <Your API Key>'

info

To include the headers in the response use `curl -i` in the request.

Response[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#response "Direct link to Response")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| HTTP Status | Content-Type | Headers | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | `application/json` |     | The API will return a JSON with the usage metrics. Refer below for JSON format |

### For Paid Plans[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#for-paid-plans "Direct link to For Paid Plans")

    {    "subscription_plan": "<Plan Name>",    "monthly_quota": <Monthly Quota>,    "current_page_count": <Current Page Count>,    "current_page_count_native_text": <For Native Text Mode>,    "current_page_count_low_cost": <For Low Cost Mode>,    "current_page_count_high_quality": <For High Quality Mode>,    "current_page_count_form": <For Form Mode>,    "daily_quota": -1,    "overage_page_count": <Overage Page Count>,    "today_page_count": <Page Count For Day>,}

> `daily_quota` will be `-1` for paid plans. There is no daily quota for paid plans.

### For Free Plan[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#for-free-plan "Direct link to For Free Plan")

    {    "subscription_plan": "<Plan Name>",    "daily_quota": <Daily Quota>,    "today_page_count": <Page Count For Day>,    "monthly_quota": -1,    "current_page_count": -1,    "overage_page_count": -1,}

> Fields marked `-1` for free plans indicate that there's no quota or it doesn't apply to these plans.

*   [Parameters](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#parameters)
    
*   [Example Curl Request](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#example-curl-request)
    
*   [Response](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#response)
    *   [For Paid Plans](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#for-paid-plans)
        
    *   [For Free Plan](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/apis/llm_whisperer_usage_api/#for-free-plan)

# LLMWhisperer Frequently Asked Questions | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/faqs/index/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

[📄️ LLMWhisperer v2: FAQs\
-------------------------\
\
We added a tonne of practical, powerful and interesting list of features (see below) to LLMWhisperer v2. However, there is one reason why we were't able to add these new features to the same service that runs v1 as additional improvements: the developer experience or DX. LLMWhisperer v1's developer portal is super limiting since it's based on Azure's APIM and we had very little control over it.](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/faqs/v1_to_v2/)

[📄️ LLMWhisperer Cloud Edition\
------------------------------\
\
LLMWhisperer Cloud is a fully managed SaaS offering that makes complex document data ready for LLM consumption. No infrastructure to manage — sign up, get an API key, and start extracting text from your documents.](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/)

-------------------\

# Signing up | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/getting_started/llm_whisperer_registering/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

LLMWhisperer comes with a forever-free plan that covers usage of up to a 100 pages per day.

Visit [LLMWhisperer](https://unstract.com/llmwhisperer/)
 and click on the `Try LLMWhisperer for free` button. You will be directed to the sign-up page.

LLMWhisperer [paid plans](https://unstract.com/pricing/)
 allow you to process more pages beyond the 100 pages/day available in the forever-free plan.

---

# LLMWhisperer On-Prem Edition | LLMWhisperer Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/on_prem_edition/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Version: 2.0.0

On this page

LLMWhisperer On-Prem Edition is deployed inside your own infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or GCP) as a Kubernetes Helm chart, ensuring your data never leaves your environment. It is ideal for organizations with strict data residency, compliance, or security requirements.

Key Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/on_prem_edition/#key-features "Direct link to Key Features")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Same feature set as [LLMWhisperer Cloud Edition](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/cloud_edition/)
    
*   **Data stays within your VPC** — documents are processed entirely within your infrastructure
*   **Kubernetes-native deployment** via Helm charts
*   **Configurable node profiles** — resource allocation and scaling configuration
*   **GPU support** for [document insights mode](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/llm_whisperer_modes/)
    
*   **LLMWhisperer Dashboard** bundled for usage monitoring and management

Deployment[​](https://docs.unstract.com/llmwhisperer/llm_whisperer/editions/on_prem_edition/#deployment "Direct link to Deployment")

.
