v0.148.3[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-148-3 "Direct link to v0.148.3")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: January 19, 2026

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Upgraded LiteLLM to 1.80.0 to fix Bedrock region routing.

* * *

v0.148.2[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-148-2 "Direct link to v0.148.2")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: January 14, 2026

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Stripe billing portal**: Integrated Stripe billing portal for subscription management.
*   **Autoscaling improvements**: Added scaling factors for worker file processing V2 autoscaling.
*   **Billing page update**: Updated Billing page with Table mode details.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-1 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed prompt-service plugin loading in on-prem builds.
*   Fixed toolPdb maxUnavailable value format.
*   Preserved management directories during Nuitka compilation.
*   Fixed confirmation alert always triggering regardless of context.
*   Restored user session persistence on verticals routes refresh.
*   Surfaced underlying library errors for database destination connectors in the UI.

* * *

v0.148.1[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-148-1 "Direct link to v0.148.1")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: January 13, 2026

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-1 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Role mappings**: Added support for SUPERVISOR and REVIEWER role mappings.

* * *

v0.148.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-148-0 "Direct link to v0.148.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: January 5, 2026

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-2 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **PodDisruptionBudget**: Added PodDisruptionBudget for tool execution pods to improve availability during cluster operations.
*   **Export reminder**: Added export reminder for [Prompt Studio](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/prompt_studio_export_project/)
     projects currently in use by workflows.
*   **Custom data in Prompt Studio**: Added [custom data](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/custom_data/)
     support in Prompt Studio.
*   **Security headers**: Added security headers and HTTP method restrictions to nginx.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-2 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Added retry logic for Kubernetes API 5xx errors in container status checks.
*   Redirected active and trial users away from subscription end page.
*   Removed CheckableTag enabled/disabled toggle from LLM profiles.

* * *

v0.147.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-147-0 "Direct link to v0.147.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: December 23, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-3 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Okta integration**: On-prem support for [Okta](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/enterprise_sso/okta/)
     enterprise SAML integration.
*   **HITL confidence editing**: Added confidence highlighting and inline editing to JSON View in [Human-in-the-Loop](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
    .

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-3 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed word-level confidence calculation issues.
*   Fixed HITL tab disable issue in configure destination.
*   Fixed search filter not clearing when switching adapter settings.
*   Added back button to Add Adapter/Connector modals.
*   Fixed pdfjs worker loading issues.

* * *

v0.146.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-146-0 "Direct link to v0.146.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: December 17, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-4 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **HITL rule engine for API deployments**: Enabled [HITL rule engine](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/hitl_rule_configuration/)
     for [API deployments](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/api_deployment/unstract_api_deployment_intro/)
    .
*   **Word-level confidence rules**: Added word-level confidence checking for HITL jsonConfidence rules.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-4 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Handled SoftTimeLimitExceeded with proper container cleanup.
*   Fixed Llama parse extraction failures.
*   Implemented SIGTERM handling in sidecar tool container for graceful shutdown.
*   Surfaced 4xx status codes in Single Pass Extraction.
*   Surfaced status codes from third-party clients in error messages.
*   Fixed handling of file paths with spaces.
*   Removed TrigramExtension to fix on-prem installation failures.
*   Passed word-level confidence setting to Structure Tool correctly.
*   Fixed HITL rule evaluation edge cases.

* * *

v0.145.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-145-0 "Direct link to v0.145.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: December 11, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-5 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Adapter search**: Added search functionality to LLMs, VectorDBs, Embeddings, and Connectors pages.
*   **File History UI improvements**: Improved [File History](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/workflows/file_history/)
     UI with clearer column names.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-5 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Updated worker PodDisruptionBudgets and added cast.ai annotations.
*   Handled 4xx exceptions in Single Pass Extraction.
*   Changed platform settings menu from click to hover interaction.
*   Fixed N+1 query patterns in execution log views.

* * *

v0.144.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-144-0 "Direct link to v0.144.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: December 8, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-6 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Max file execution count**: Added `MAX_FILE_EXECUTION_COUNT` configuration to limit concurrent file processing.
*   **Execution log controls**: Added auto-refresh and controls for execution logs.
*   **File history viewer**: Added [file history](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/workflows/file_history/)
     viewer with maximum file execution count limit.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-6 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Disabled broken Oracle connector.
*   Captured connector error logs in ETL pipelines.

* * *

v0.143.2[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-143-2 "Direct link to v0.143.2")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: December 5, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-7 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Upgraded LLMWhisperer to v0.19.2.

* * *

v0.143.1[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-143-1 "Direct link to v0.143.1")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: December 4, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-8 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Updated [Azure LLM adapter](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/adapters/llms/azure_openai_llm/)
     to use deployment name as model name.
*   Fixed validation issue with deployment name for Azure OpenAI LLM.

* * *

v0.143.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-143-0 "Direct link to v0.143.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: December 4, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-7 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Multiple API keys**: Added support for creating multiple API keys in the LLMWhisperer portal.
*   **Organization sharing for workflows**: Enabled organization-level sharing for workflows.
*   **File processing order**: Added configurable file processing order (FIFO/LIFO with round-robin).
*   **Batch processing**: Added batch processing support for pipelines.
*   **Smart table extractor**: Added smart table extractor for Excel files.
*   **XLSM file support**: Added support for [XLSM file format](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/supported_file_types/list_of_file_types_supported/)
    .
*   **Custom Anthropic API key**: Added support for custom [Anthropic](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/adapters/llms/anthropic_llm/)
     API key from request headers.
*   **Bulk download for HITL**: Implemented [bulk download](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/bulk_download/)
     for HITL approved records.
*   **Word-level confidence**: Added word-level confidence with [HITL rule engine](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/hitl_rule_configuration/)
     support.
*   **Public playground access**: Enabled public playground access without authentication.
*   **Improved prompt logs**: Improved prompt logs display in [Prompt Studio](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/prompt_studio_intro/)
    .

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-9 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Migrated unstract-sdk library to sdk1.
*   Removed Gunicorn max-requests setting to prevent 502 errors.
*   Optimized Auth0 role lookup performance.

* * *

v0.142.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-142-0 "Direct link to v0.142.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: November 18, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-8 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Okta SAML via Auth0**: Added [Okta](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/enterprise_sso/okta/)
     enterprise SAML connection using Auth0.
*   **Connection pool tuning**: Increased PgBouncer connection pool sizes.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-10 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Tracked page usage only for successful executions.
*   Fixed notification plugin loading.

* * *

v0.141.1[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-141-1 "Direct link to v0.141.1")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: November 13, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-11 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Updated worker v2 deployment strategy to 25% max unavailable/surge.
*   Fixed HITL rule evaluation and added jsonConfidence bracket notation support.
*   Added support for API workflow testing from the workflow page with proper queue routing.

* * *

v0.141.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-141-0 "Direct link to v0.141.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: November 12, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-9 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Organization sharing for pipelines and API deployments**: Enabled organization-level sharing for [ETL pipelines](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/etl_pipeline/unstract_etl_pipeline_intro/)
    , Task pipelines, and [API deployments](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/api_deployment/unstract_api_deployment_intro/)
    .
*   **Email notifications for sharing**: Added email notification support for connector sharing.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-12 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Extended sharing notifications to support connector resource type.
*   Removed Flipt as a bundled chart dependency.
*   Improved global rate limit error message.

* * *

v0.140.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-140-0 "Direct link to v0.140.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: November 10, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-10 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Packet processing for HITL**: Added packet processing support for [HITL](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
     manual review.
*   **Sharing notifications**: Extended sharing notifications to support adapters and Prompt Studio projects.
*   **Smart table extractor**: Implemented smart table extractor for Excel files.
*   **XLSM support in API deployments**: Added XLSM file support in [API deployments](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/api_deployment/unstract_api_deployment_intro/)
    .
*   **Custom API key support**: Added custom [Anthropic](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/adapters/llms/anthropic_llm/)
     API key and LLMWhisperer key support from request headers.
*   **File processing order**: Added FIFO/LIFO file processing order with round-robin batching.
*   **Organization sharing**: Enabled organization-level sharing for workflows, adapters, and Prompt Studio projects.
*   **Active file cache TTL**: Added active file cache TTL configuration.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-13 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Configured PostHog for cloud vs on-prem environments.
*   Improved settings navigation and modal styling.
*   Improved prompt logs display in Prompt Studio.
*   Fixed multiple multi-sheet Excel processing issues.

* * *

v0.139.4[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-139-4 "Direct link to v0.139.4")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: November 5, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-14 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed case sensitivity issue in Auth0 authentication.

* * *

v0.139.3[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-139-3 "Direct link to v0.139.3")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: November 3, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-15 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   API deployments now properly clean up execution directories after completion.

* * *

v0.139.2[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-139-2 "Direct link to v0.139.2")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: November 2, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-16 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Added InternalAPIAuthMiddleware to Django middleware stack.

* * *

v0.139.1[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-139-1 "Direct link to v0.139.1")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: October 31, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-11 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Nuitka code obfuscation**: Added Nuitka-based code obfuscation for on-prem worker unified docker image.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-17 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed Celery SIGSEGV crash issue.
*   Fixed task duplication during warm shutdown.

* * *

v0.139.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-139-0 "Direct link to v0.139.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: October 27, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-12 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **API rate limiting**: Added per-organization [API rate limiting](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/api_deployment/unstract_api_deployment_intro/)
     with cache-based locking.
*   **SDK1 migration**: Migrated to SDK1 with LiteLLM integration, retry logic, and exponential backoff.
*   **Organization sharing**: Enabled organization-level sharing for workflows, adapters, and Prompt Studio projects.
*   **Sharing notifications**: Added sharing notifications via email.
*   **Active file cache TTL**: Added active file cache TTL configuration.
*   **Unified worker improvements**: De-Djangofied Celery workers with internal APIs for improved performance.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-18 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Improved execution tracking configuration.
*   Updated worker rollout strategy.
*   Improved Celery worker stability with broker heartbeats, chord retry, and duplicate detection.
*   Improved PgBouncer, RabbitMQ, and autoscaling configurations.

* * *

v0.138.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-138-0 "Direct link to v0.138.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: September 25, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-13 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Enterprise SSO organization mapping**: Added SSO organization mapping support for custom domains. See [Enterprise SSO](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/enterprise_sso/okta/)
     for details.
*   **FIFO/LIFO file processing order**: Implemented configurable file processing order with round-robin batching.

* * *

v0.137.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-137-0 "Direct link to v0.137.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: September 23, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-14 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Custom data variable support in Prompt Studio**: Added [custom data](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/custom_data/)
     variable support for dynamic prompt variable replacement.
*   **Deeper PostgreSQL connectivity check**: Added deeper PostgreSQL connectivity validation in prerequisite containers.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-19 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed referential error with prerequisite containers.

* * *

v0.136.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-136-0 "Direct link to v0.136.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: September 4, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-15 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Dynamic table rendering in HITL**: Implemented dynamic table rendering for special data cases and complex JSON in [HITL](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
     review.
*   **Post-processing webhook in Prompt Studio**: Added [post-processing webhook](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/post_processing_webhook/)
     URL support in Prompt Studio and exported APIs.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-20 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed HITL queue TTL conflict causing record duplication.
*   Fixed TTL conflict when returning API-pushed documents to queue.
*   Fixed post-processing webhook URL not being saved in exported APIs.

* * *

v0.135.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-135-0 "Direct link to v0.135.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: September 2, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-16 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **HITL highlight traversal**: Added navigation buttons to traverse multiple highlight locations in [HITL](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
     review.
*   **Centralized connector management**: Centralized [connector](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/)
     management with explicit save button and validation enhancements.
*   **Presigned S3 URL support**: Support presigned S3 URLs for file uploads in API deployments.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-21 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed ETL workflow failure when a renamed adapter is used in tool settings.
*   Fixed file count validation and improved error message format in workflow execution.
*   Fixed GDrive connector always showing as authenticated in workflow settings.
*   Fixed connector sharing and Google Drive folder path issues.
*   Fixed file processing to continue on cleanup-related errors.

* * *

v0.134.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-134-0 "Direct link to v0.134.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: August 21, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-17 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Raw view support in HITL**: Added raw view mode for reviewing documents in [HITL](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
    .
*   **Separate Celery result backend database**: Added `CELERY_BACKEND_DB_NAME` environment variable for separate Celery result backend database.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-22 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed HITL autoscroll broken behavior and CSS issues.
*   Fixed metadata API returning wrong data in API deployments.

* * *

v0.133.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-133-0 "Direct link to v0.133.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: August 19, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-23 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed TSV alignment issue for rent rolls.
*   Fixed MSSQL support for creating missing tables and inserting data into schema.table.

* * *

v0.132.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-132-0 "Direct link to v0.132.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: August 12, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-18 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **LLM adapter selection for summarization**: Enable direct LLM adapter selection in summarization settings, replacing LLM profile selection.
*   **HITL TTL implementation**: Added time-to-live support and enhancements for [Human-in-the-Loop](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
     review.
*   **Advanced retrieval options in Prompt Studio**: Added advanced retrieval configuration options in [Prompt Studio](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/prompt_studio_intro/)
    .
*   **Simplified workflow studio UI**: Implemented simplified [workflow](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/workflows/workflows_intro/)
     studio interface with improved connector UI and deployment options.
*   **SIGTERM forwarding in tool containers**: Added dumb-init wrapper to forward SIGTERM signals to Python processes in tool containers.
*   **Filter API deployments**: Filter [API deployments](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/api_deployment/unstract_api_deployment_intro/)
     by tool and reorganize export menu.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-24 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed blank screen error when searching adapters in dropdown while adding LLM profile.
*   Fixed HITL approve sync issue with database.
*   Fixed Redis queue directory structure to resolve cloud build import errors.

* * *

v0.131.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-131-0 "Direct link to v0.131.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: August 4, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-19 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Subscription management via Stripe Customer Portal**: Enabled users to manage their subscriptions directly through Stripe's customer portal.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-25 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Prevented duplicate AutoApprovalSettings entries and fixed empty GET responses.
*   Fixed incorrect parsing of nested JSON array values.
*   Fixed API HITL failure and eliminated code duplication in queue handling.
*   Resolved empty task\_id causing 404 status API errors.
*   Improved error handling when deploying as API from Prompt Studio.
*   Fixed connector modal selection issue.

* * *

v0.130.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-130-0 "Direct link to v0.130.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: July 23, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-20 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **HITL push through API**: Added support for pushing [human-in-the-loop](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
     reviews through the API.
*   **Configurable ETL schedule intervals**: Support for configurable [ETL](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/etl_pipeline/unstract_etl_pipeline_intro/)
     schedule intervals with conflict prevention and 30-minute minimum.
*   **API deployment confirmation modal**: Display existing [API deployments](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/api_deployment/unstract_api_deployment_intro/)
     before creating a new deployment from Prompt Studio.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-26 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed auto approval not working issue.
*   Fixed Django migration conflict for AutoApprovalSettings model.
*   Removed passage of entire history to iterations in Rent Rolls to improve performance.
*   Fixed ToolMetadataNotFound error when `use_file_history` is true.

* * *

v0.129.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-129-0 "Direct link to v0.129.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: July 18, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-21 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **HITL auto approval**: Added [automatic approval](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/hitl_auto_approval/)
     support for human-in-the-loop quality review.
*   **HITL management interface**: Added management capabilities for human-in-the-loop reviews.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-27 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed Mistral AI failing test connection for some models.
*   Optimized Auth0 API calls to handle rate limits and prevent throttling.

* * *

v0.128.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-128-0 "Direct link to v0.128.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: July 8, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-22 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Dynamic LLM profile override in API deployments**: Allow dynamically overriding the LLM profile when invoking [API deployments](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/api_deployment/unstract_api_deployment_intro/)
    .
*   **Cross-organization Prompt Studio export/import**: Support [exporting](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/prompt_studio_export_project/)
     and [importing](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/import_prompt_studio_project/)
     Prompt Studio projects across organizations.
*   **Enhanced preamble/postamble UX**: Auto-resize text areas and expandable view for [preamble and postamble](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/preamble_and_postamble/)
     fields.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-28 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed costs and tokens not displaying for AWS Bedrock adapter.
*   Preserve non-Latin characters by adding `ensure_ascii=False` to `repair_json`.
*   Auto-scroll when highlighting text files in HITL.
*   Fixed public share for API deployment from Prompt Studio.

* * *

v0.127.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-127-0 "Direct link to v0.127.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: July 1, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-29 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed Stripe webhook processing errors for subscriptions.
*   Fixed image highlight issues and added unsupported file viewer in HITL.
*   Fixed highlight not working in HITL.
*   Added loading overlay during logout.
*   Added support for additional parameters in adapters.

* * *

v0.126.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-126-0 "Direct link to v0.126.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: June 23, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-23 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Text and image file support in HITL**: Added support for viewing and highlighting text and image files in [human-in-the-loop](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/human_quality_review/human_quality_review_intro/)
     review.
*   **File type validation in workflows**: Prevent unsupported files in API and [ETL](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/etl_pipeline/unstract_etl_pipeline_intro/)
     workflow executions by validating file extension and MIME type.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-30 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Added indexes for faster execution log queries.

* * *

v0.125.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-125-0 "Direct link to v0.125.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: June 18, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-24 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Improved file deduplication**: Enhanced file deduplication in [ETL/Task pipelines](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/etl_pipeline/unstract_etl_pipeline_intro/)
     to ensure all unique files are processed.

* * *

v0.124.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-124-0 "Direct link to v0.124.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: June 12, 2025

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-31 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Removed duplicate indexing and reduced log noise during workflow tool runs.
*   Filtered execution logs based on status of file execution.

* * *

v0.123.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-123-0 "Direct link to v0.123.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: June 10, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-25 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Reasoning and thinking model support**: Added support for reasoning and thinking models in [Azure OpenAI](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/adapters/llms/azure_openai_llm/)
     and [AWS Bedrock](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/adapters/llms/amazon_bedrock/)
     adapters.
*   **Drag and drop file upload in Prompt Studio**: Added drag and drop support for uploading files in [Prompt Studio](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/adding_and_managing_documents/)
    .

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-32 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Redacted Celery broker password that was printed in tool sidecar logs.

* * *

v0.122.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-122-0 "Direct link to v0.122.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: June 5, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-26 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **RabbitMQ support as Celery broker**: Added RabbitMQ CRD and Celery broker migration job with related environment configurations.
*   **Worker pod/container status polling**: Added polling for container or pod status check from worker.

* * *

v0.121.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-121-0 "Direct link to v0.121.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: May 27, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-27 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Database migrations as Helm job**: Moved database migrations to run as a Kubernetes job.
*   **Sidecar and structure tool version syncing**: Sidecar and structure tool versions now update automatically with the app version.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-33 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Disabled liveness probes for worker and worker-api-deployment pods to prevent unnecessary restarts.
*   Fixed delimiter handling in extraction prompts.
*   Fixed node selector environment passing to runner for tools.

* * *

v0.120.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-120-0 "Direct link to v0.120.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: May 21, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-28 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **Table extractor rolling window**: Added rolling window changes for table extraction to improve processing.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-34 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Updated worker liveness probes to avoid backend restarts on probe failures.
*   Removed exception raise during cleanup to prevent workflow interruptions.

* * *

v0.110.0[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#v0-110-0 "Direct link to v0.110.0")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Release Date**: March 4, 2025

### New Features[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#new-features-34 "Direct link to New Features")

*   **On-prem Helm charts**: Added Helm charts for on-prem Kubernetes deployments with GCR push support. See [On-Prem Deployment](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/user_guides/on_prem_deployment/)
     for details.
*   **Celery visibility timeout configuration**: Added backend environment variable for Celery visibility timeout.
*   **Remote storage generally available**: Removed remote storage feature flag, making remote storage GA.

### Bug Fixes[​](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/changelog/cloud/2025/#bug-fixes-40 "Direct link to Bug Fixes")

*   Fixed new line issues in table extractor.
*   Fixed backend replica scaling for on-prem deployments.

*   **Line-item extraction plugin**: Added line-item extraction plugin for structured data extraction from documents.

*   **Multi-document support in Prompt Studio**: Added support for working with multiple documents simultaneously in [Prompt Studio](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/features/prompt_studio/adding_and_managing_documents/)
    .
*   **Remote storage SDK support**: Rolled SDK to support remote storage functionality.

*   **Configurable proxy protocol**: Added `PROXY_PROTOCOL` as a configurable environment variable.

# Filesystems supported by Unstract | Unstract Documentation

[Skip to main content](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/filesystems/index/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

[📄️ Azure Cloud Storage Connector\
---------------------------------\
\
Azure Cloud Storage is a scalable, secure service for storing large amounts of unstructured data, including text, images, and video. It supports various storage types like blobs, files, queues, and tables, making it versatile for different storage needs.](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/filesystems/azure_cloud_storage/)

[📄️ Dropbox Filesystem Connector\
--------------------------------\
\
Dropbox is a cloud-based file hosting service that offers cloud file hosting and other services.](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/filesystems/dropbox_filesystem/)

[📄️ Google Drive Filesystem Connector\
-------------------------------------\
\
File system connectors like Google Drive enable seamless integration between applications and cloud storage services, facilitating efficient file management, sharing, and storage across platforms.](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/filesystems/google_drive_filesystem/)

[📄️ Minio Filesystem Connector\
------------------------------\
\
File system connectors like Minio enable seamless integration between applications and cloud storage services, facilitating efficient file management, sharing, and storage across platforms.](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/filesystems/s3_minio_filesystem/)

[📄️ S3 Filesystem Connector\
---------------------------\
\
File system connectors like S3 enable seamless integration between applications and cloud storage services, facilitating efficient file management, sharing, and storage across platforms.](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/filesystems/s3_filesystem/)

[📄️ SharePoint Filesystem Connector\
-----------------------------------\
\
File system connectors like SharePoint enable Unstract to read files from SharePoint Online document libraries and OneDrive for Business. It supports Microsoft 365 work/school accounts from any organization.](https://docs.unstract.com/unstract/unstract_platform/connectors/filesystems/sharepoint_filesystem/)
